description: Pipeline for extracting and cataloging Rock Band 4 songs from PS4 PKG files
important_notes: PS4 has NO internet connectivity - completely offline, no network-synced entitlements
No central SongList.json or songs.dta exists in RB4 - metadata is distributed across PKGs
Our extraction method (parsing PKGs) is the ONLY way to get song list from RB4
Baseline file (rb4songlistWithRivals.txt) contains ALL 99 free songs from v1.00 + Rivals xpak
v2.21 update was a maintenance patch with no new songs
The 4,084 song count on PS4 cannot be compared against any 'truth' file - gap source is unknown
known_issues: Parallel.ForEach in PkgTool.Core causes file lock race conditions - fixed with DOTNET_ProcessorCount=1
